prompt: Make the paint even more rough and textured, Especially the background.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Increase the rough and textured quality of the paint throughout the artwork. Apply more prominent brushstrokes and a visibly tactile surface, making the paint appear less smooth and more substantial. Focus especially on enhancing this effect in the background regions, specifically the large grey-brown wall behind the figures and the green-brown ground plane at the bottom, rendering them significantly rougher.
